backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a chat application that manages chatrooms, messages, user profiles, reactions, and access control, with blob storage and HTTP outcall integrations.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two UI features (button spacing and font-mono URL styling in ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal) to their relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, hook, and page.
frontend/index.html: Root HTML entry point for the React app with cache-busting meta tags, a root div, and a versioned module script tag pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component that sets up TanStack Router with lobby, chatroom, and admin routes, conditionally rendering the Header and Footer based on the current route.
frontend/src/components/AvatarPickerDial: Dialog component allowing users to set their avatar via file upload, GIF search (Giphy), or removal, with debounced search and trending GIF fallback.
frontend/src/components/ChatArea.tsx: Main chat interface component that renders messages, handles sending, reply context, auto-scroll, scroll-to-target-message, and a collapsible header with pinned video support.
frontend/src/components/ChatroomCard.tsx: Renders a card for a chatroom with thumbnail previews for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter media, displaying topic, category, live status, and participant counts.
frontend/src/components/CreateChatroomDi: Modal dialog for creating a new chatroom with fields for topic, description, category, and media (image upload, video URL, or Twitter post), including validation and upload progress.
frontend/src/components/ExternalLinkDisc: Confirmation dialog that warns users before navigating to an external URL, displaying the target link and offering Cancel/Continue actions.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying a copyright notice and a link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with the Chattr logo, back-to-lobby navigation when inside a chatroom, and inline username editing with an avatar picker.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: No-op placeholder component that renders nothing; authentication is intentionally not used in this app.
frontend/src/components/MessageBubble.ts: Renders an individual chat message with support for reactions, pinning, replies, media embeds (YouTube, Twitch, Twitter, GIFs), URL link detection, voice playback, and message reporting.
frontend/src/components/MessageInput.tsx: Chat input component supporting text messages, image uploads, GIF search via Giphy, voice recording, and auto-detection of YouTube/Twitch/Twitter URLs pasted into the text field.
frontend/src/components/PinnedVideo.tsx: Renders a pinned YouTube or Twitch video as an embedded iframe within a chatroom, with an unpin button that calls the useUnpinVideo mutation.
frontend/src/components/VoiceMessagePlay: Audio player component for voice messages featuring a play/pause toggle, a randomized waveform visualization, a seek slider, and automatic pausing of other playing audio elements.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all non-actor queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useDebouncedValue.ts: Generic hook that debounces a value by a configurable delay, returning the latest settled value after the delay elapses.
frontend/src/hooks/useForceFreshChatroom: Hook that purges stale or empty chatroom cache entries and forces a fresh refetch of the chatrooms list once the ICP actor becomes ready, exposing an isRecovering flag for loading UI.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context (login, logout, identity state) via a React context and AuthClient, with support for delegation validation and configurable idle/login options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Central React Query hooks file covering chatroom listing/search/category queries, message queries, and mutations for sending messages, reactions, image uploads, and video pinning, with localStorage-based username/avatar management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines light/dark theme CSS variables using OKLCH color space, and includes custom styles for mobile inputs, voice message range sliders, and layout.
frontend/src/lib/config.ts: Exports frontend configuration constants including the Giphy API key and result limit.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports a single utility function `formatCompactNumber` that formats numbers into compact notation (k, M, B).
frontend/src/lib/giphy.ts: Provides functions to search Giphy and fetch trending GIFs via the Giphy API, returning normalized GIF objects with preview and original URLs.
frontend/src/lib/html2canvasLoader.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a lazy-loader for the html2canvas library.
frontend/src/lib/imageCompression.ts: Client-side image compression utility that resizes and recompresses image files using a canvas element, with progress callbacks and fallback to the original file.
frontend/src/lib/twitterEmbedRenderer.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter embed rendering utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreview.ts: Fetches Twitter oEmbed JSON to extract safe preview fields (author, text, image) with in-flight deduplication and localStorage caching.
frontend/src/lib/twitterOEmbedPreviewCac: localStorage cache layer for Twitter oEmbed preview data, supporting versioned entries with a 7-day expiration and cache key derivation from tweet IDs.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnail.ts: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail fetching utility.
frontend/src/lib/twitterThumbnailCache.t: Empty file, likely a placeholder for a Twitter thumbnail caching utility.
frontend/src/lib/videoUtils.ts: Utility functions for extracting video/post IDs and generating thumbnail or embed URLs for YouTube, Twitch, and Twitter/X links.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDeleteChatroomsP: Password-protected admin moderation page that lists chatrooms with flagged message counts, supports filtering/searching, and allows admins to delete chatrooms via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ChatroomPage.tsx: Page component that loads a specific chatroom by ID, handles loading/error states, increments view count on load, and renders the ChatArea component with an optional target message ID from query params.
frontend/src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx: Lobby page displaying a searchable, filterable, and algorithmically sorted list of chatrooms with a create chatroom dialog and category badge filters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, box shadow, accordion keyframes, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking existing features and fix requests, specifically for adding button spacing and applying font-mono to the URL in the ExternalLinkDisclaimerModal component.
